{"step_by_step_thinking": "Multiple myeloma is characterized by increased immunoglobulin (Ig) levels in serum, plasmacytosis, and the presence of an M spike on electrophoresis. ANA (antinuclear antibodies) positivity is more commonly associated with autoimmune diseases and systemic lupus erythematosus, not multiple myeloma. Therefore, ANA positivity is not a characteristic feature of multiple myeloma.", "answer_choice": "B"}
